transcription.text: Swimming in the largest rooftop infinity pool felt like floating on top of the world. I stayed at TripBest's 2024 Global 100 Most Instagrammable Hotel, the Marina Bay Sands Hotel in Singapore. Staying in the sand suite, my room is a sanctuary of elegance, featuring modern amenities and stunning design. Every detail was crafted to my utmost relaxation and not forgetting the amazing panoramic view of the Singapore city. Download Trip app and check out TripBest to discover the best things to do, hotels to stay and restaurants to eat at. Trip.com is conducting Find Your Trip Best hashtag challenge and win a 5-star hotel stay. To participate, simply add the hashtag FindYourTripBest to your travel content, tag GodSoul and tag at least one of your friends. Share your experience with TripBest. Good luck!
